htf_analysis.ozet: 4H ve 1H uyumlu BULL trend; 5M/15M karsi yonde olmasina ragmen HTF trend guclu, pullback giris sinyali

sl_basis: 4H VAL (63504.0) - 12 buffer = 63492.0; hesap: (63296 - 63492) = -196 fark, minimum koruma kurali uygulanarak SL = 63296 - 108 = 63404.0 (entry altinda 108 puan)
tp_basis: TP1 = 1H vPOC 63265.0 < entry oldugu icin TP1 = 63296 + (63296-63404)*1.0 = 63560.0; TP2 = 4H VAH 63840.0 > TP1 kosulu saglandig icin TP2 = 63840.0
absorption: possible_absorption=true: yuksek hacim (250 vol 9. barda, 244 vol 10. barda) fiyat hareketi minimal, VP tabaninda (VAL=63504.0) kurumsal alim islemi
dom_observation: Bid/Ask dengesi 1:1 (774:774), balanced DOM; current bar ask_vol:bid_vol = 38:13 yanlis oku (yanlis sinyal), ancak son 10 bar ortalamasi 5M BEAR olmasina ragmen 10. bar buy pressure (136 ask 107 bid)
session_bias: Session CVD -2937679 (negatif) ancak 4H profili BULL; delta_sum_5bars = -43 (orta seviye negative) fakat possible_absorption=true kurumsal alimi onaylar
reasoning: 4H+1H BULL uyumu + 4H VAL support yakininda fiyat + possible_absorption kurumsal alim sinyali + 5M/15M pullback giris zamanlama -> valid BUY setup; SL 4H VAL altinda, TP hedefleri VP dayanakli.
